title: Evaluate the Bracket Pairs of a String
titleCn: 替换字符串中的括号内容

testcases.input: s = "(name)is(age)yearsold", knowledge = [["name","bob"],["age","two"]] Output: "bobistwoyearsold" Explanation: The key "name" has a value of "bob", so replace "(name)" with "bob". The key "age" has a value of "two", so replace "(age)" with "two".
testcases.expectedOutput: "bobistwoyearsold" Explanation: The key "name" has a value of "bob", so replace "(name)" with "bob". The key "age" has a value of "two", so replace "(age)" with "two".

testcases.input: s = "hi(name)", knowledge = [["a","b"]] Output: "hi?" Explanation: As you do not know the value of the key "name", replace "(name)" with "?".
testcases.expectedOutput: "hi?" Explanation: As you do not know the value of the key "name", replace "(name)" with "?".

testcases.input: s = "(a)(a)(a)aaa", knowledge = [["a","yes"]] Output: "yesyesyesaaa" Explanation: The same key can appear multiple times. The key "a" has a value of "yes", so replace all occurrences of "(a)" with "yes". Notice that the "a"s not in a bracket pair are not evaluated.
testcases.expectedOutput: "yesyesyesaaa" Explanation: The same key can appear multiple times. The key "a" has a value of "yes", so replace all occurrences of "(a)" with "yes". Notice that the "a"s not in a bracket pair are not evaluated.
